_comment: REAL Twilio Real-Time Transcription payload captured by the Plan 2 spike 2026-07-10 (CallSid redacted-ish, AccountSid replaced). Delivery = webhook POST, application/x-www-form-urlencoded; these are the parsed form params (parseTwilioForm output). TranscriptionData is a nested JSON STRING. Track diarizes: inbound_track=guest(caller), outbound_track=agent(our side). transcription-started fires first (no TranscriptionData); transcription-content carries text.
